ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Aug-14-2017 Continued To Aug-21-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Catherine Yee for Elaine Chang.

Ms. Yee stated that the status report was e-filed today. Status on close of estate is continued to August 21, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Aug-14-2017 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-24-2017 Continued To Aug-14-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Attorney to appear on August 14, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why she failed to appear and why a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration has not been filed. Status on close of estate is also continued to that date.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jan-20-2016 Granted Per Written Order
